# TS9204

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
{macro} requires {expected} type argument(s)
```

## Explanation

The macro requires type arguments to be provided.

Example: typeInfo&lt;User&gt;() instead of typeInfo()

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
